shaders.title: CRT Soft (Curved)
shaders.description: Has scanlines, but they’re softened and blended for less harshness. Includes screen curvature for a classic CRT look.

shaders.title: CRT Soft (Flat)
shaders.description: Light scanlines with a clean and softened appearance. Designed for flat screens without curvature.

shaders.title: CRT Arcade (Flat)
shaders.description: Mimics an arcade CRT with strong scanlines and vibrant color. Flat display with a retro feel.

shaders.title: CRT Classic (Curved)
shaders.description: Bold scanlines with strong curvature. Feels like an older curved CRT TV with deep contrast.

shaders.title: CRT Clean (Flat)
shaders.description: Subtle and high-quality scanlines with accurate color blending. No curvature; ideal for crisp CRT emulation.

shaders.title: Upscale HQ2x
shaders.description: Doubles the game’s resolution with smooth pixel edges. Great for making low-res games look cleaner without blurring.

shaders.title: Upscale HQ3x
shaders.description: Triples the original resolution, smoothing out jagged edges while keeping the classic pixel style.

shaders.title: Upscale HQ4x
shaders.description: Upscales the image to four times the resolution. Ideal for clean, high-res output of classic games on modern displays.

shaders.title: Upscale FidelityFX
shaders.description: Uses AMD’s FidelityFX algorithm to upscale low-resolution graphics with better sharpness and edge clarity. Enhances visuals without blurring.

shaders.title: LCD Dot Matrix
shaders.description: Simulates a low-resolution dot matrix display, similar to early handheld systems. Emulates pixel separation, subpixel glow, and screen diffusion.

shaders.title: LCD zFast
shaders.description: High-performance shader that emulates the look of LCD pixels using minimal system resources. Ideal for gameplay-focused setups needing low latency.

shaders.title: LCD Generic
shaders.description: Applies general LCD-like visual effects including low refresh artifacts, mild ghosting, and slight flicker to mimic early handheld displays.

shaders.title: LCD Simpletex
shaders.description: A lightweight LCD shader that simulates basic screen diffusion and texture. Optimized for low-resource devices and sharp pixel rendering.

shaders.title: LCD Simpletex (720p Optimized)
shaders.description: 720p-optimized version of the Simpletex LCD shader. Maintains clean LCD simulation while improving performance and sharpness at lower resolutions.

shaders.title: LCD Game Boy (DMG)
shaders.description: Simulates the original Game Boy's iconic green-tinted screen. Renders grayscale graphics with the ghosting and pixel response of the DMG-01's monochrome LCD display.

shaders.title: LCD Game Boy Light
shaders.description: Emulates the Game Boy Light's backlit monochrome display, offering a brighter and cooler screen tone with reduced ghosting compared to the original DMG.

shaders.title: LCD Game Boy Pocket
shaders.description: Simulates the Game Boy Pocket's sharper monochrome LCD with improved contrast and reduced motion blur, while keeping a neutral gray tone.

shaders.title: VHS Tape Effect
shaders.description: Adds VHS-style distortion, jitter, and color bleed. Looks like a worn-out tape on an old VCR.
